---
title: "08-rna_protein_loglog_plot"
output: 
  html_notebook:
    toc: true
---

```{r, warning=F, message=F}


library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)






# 8.1. Import data


data_dir <- "C:/Users/User/Documents/UCSF/BREATH2.Gene/data"
results_dir <- "C:/Users/User/Documents/UCSF/BREATH2.Gene/results"

# RNA vst matrix (genes x samples)
full_vsd <- read.csv(
  file.path(data_dir, "vst_full.csv"),
  check.names=F, row.names=1)

# Protein log2-normalized abundances matrix (samples x proteins)
protein_mat <- read.csv(
  "C:/Users/User/Documents/UCSF/BREATH2.Prot/data/protein_mat.csv",
  check.names=F, row.names=1)






# 8.2. Prepare RNA


rna_mean <- data.frame(
  gene = rownames(full_vsd),
  mean_rna_vst = rowMeans(full_vsd, na.rm=T)
  ) %>%
  mutate(gene_symbol = ifelse(is.na(ensg2gene[gene]),
  gene, ensg2gene[gene])) %>%
  group_by(gene_symbol) %>%
  summarize(mean_rna_vst = mean(mean_rna_vst, na.rm=T), .groups="drop")






# 8.3. Prepare protein


protein_mean <- data.frame(
  gene_symbol = colnames(protein_mat),
  mean_protein_log2 = colMeans(protein_mat, na.rm=T)
  )






# 8.4. Merge RNA with protein


loglog_df <- inner_join(
  rna_mean,
  protein_mean,
  by = "gene_symbol"
)

# Identify top genes by combined mean abundance (RNA + protein)
label_df <- loglog_df %>%
  mutate(total_abundance = mean_rna_vst + mean_protein_log2) %>%
  arrange(desc(total_abundance)) %>%
  head(20)

# Correlation
cor_spearman <- cor(
  loglog_df$mean_rna_vst,
  loglog_df$mean_protein_log2,
  method = "spearman"
)






# 8.5. Log-log abundance plot


min_x <- min(loglog_df$mean_rna_vst, na.rm=T)

ggplot(
  loglog_df,
  aes(x = mean_rna_vst, y = mean_protein_log2)
  ) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.25, size = 1, color = "grey30") +
  geom_smooth(method="loess", span=0.75, se=TRUE,
            color="firebrick", fill="firebrick",
            alpha=0.15, linewidth=0.8) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = label_df,
    aes(label = gene_symbol),
    size = 3,
    max.overlaps = 20,
    box.padding = 0.4,
    segment.color = "grey70"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(
    xlim = c(min_x, 18),
    ylim = c(min_x, 18)
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    x = "Mean RNA expression (VST)",
    y = expression("Mean protein abundance (log"[2]*")"),
    title = "RNA–Protein Abundance Relationship",
    subtitle = paste0(
      "Spearman \u03C1 = ", round(cor_spearman, 2),
      " | n = ", nrow(loglog_df)
    )
  ) 
  
  
ggsave(
  file.path(results_dir, "RNA_protein_loglog_abundance.pdf"),
  width = 6,
  height = 6
)






```
